question_text:

This condition is Bohr's frequency condition.

subject: Physics
question_text:
A mass of 10  kg is suspended vertically by a rope of length 5 m from the roof. A force of 30 N is applied at the middle point of rope in horizontal direction. The angle made by upper half of the rope with vertical is $$\theta$$ = tan$$-$$1 (x $$\times$$ 10$$-$$1). The value of x is ____________.
(Given, g = 10 m/s2)

subject: Physics
question_text: A rolling wheel of 12 kg is on an inclined plane at position P and connected to a mass of 3 kg through a string of fixed length and pulley as shown in figure. Consider PR as friction free surface. The velocity of centre of mass of the wheel when it reaches at the bottom Q of the inclined plane PQ will be $${1 \over 2}\sqrt {xgh} $$ m/s. The value of x is ___________.

subject: Physics
question_text: A diatomic gas ($$\gamma$$ = 1.4) does 400J of work when it is expanded isobarically. The heat given to the gas in the process is __________ J.

subject: Physics

subject: Physics
question_text: A parallel plate capacitor is made up of stair like structure with a plate area A of each stair and that is connected with a wire of length b, as shown in the figure. The capacitance of the arrangement is $${x \over {15}}{{{ \in _0}A} \over b}$$. The value of x is ____________.
